prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年综合类最低位次分别约106395→102528→103324→108386→121771，2021–2023年基本稳定在10.2万–10.6万之间，2024年小幅后移至10.8万，2025年大幅后移至12.2万，近一年后移约1.3万名，下行趋势明显；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年90人、2022年89人、2023年90人、2024年73人、2025年91人；2026年计划91人，与2025年持平，计划总量未对竞争格局产生额外影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西藏大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2022年第189位、2024年第192位、2025年第195位，排名持续小幅下滑，2026年未进入前200名，整体层次在211高校中偏后；该校近年声誉舆情平稳，未见明显正面或负面事件；抖音热度排名第30位（较热），主要视频内容围绕"世界最高学府"海拔3650米等话题，关注度尚可但偏猎奇，对实际报考决策的拉动作用有限；历史无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中西藏大学无A-及以上等级学科，学科竞争力在211高校中相对薄弱，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 山东省2021–2026年考生总数持续增长（54.4万→59.5万→66.2万→66.6万→68.1万→72万），2026年较2025年增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），整体竞争加剧；西藏大学位于拉萨市，距山东省较远，跨省就读意愿受地域偏好影响较大，在同等分数段考生中通常优先考虑东部或中部高校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已大幅后移1.3万名的下行趋势、2026年山东省考生总数增加约5.7%带来的竞争加剧、招生计划持平、学校排名持续下滑且无A类优势学科等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准121771名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约123271名，区间122771–123771名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum comprehensive rankings were approximately 106395 → 102528 → 103324 → 108386 → 121771. From 2021 to 2023, they remained stable between 102,000 and 106,000. In 2024, there was a slight decline to 108,000, and in 2025, a significant decline to 122,000, with a drop of about 13,000 in the past year, indicating a clear downward trend. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Shandong Province was 90 in 2021, 89 in 2022, 90 in 2023, 73 in 2024, and 91 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 91, unchanged from 2025, so the total plan size has not had an additional impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 189th in 2022, 192nd in 2024, and 195th in 2025, showing a continuous slight decline. In 2026, it did not enter the top 200, placing it at the lower end among 211 universities. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant positive or negative events. It ranks 30th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with main video content focusing on topics like 'the world's highest university' at an altitude of 3,650 meters. Attention is moderate but leans towards novelty, with limited impact on actual application decisions. There is no history of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tibet University had no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak disciplinary competitiveness among 211 universities and limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: From 2021 to 2026, the total number of candidates in Shandong Province has been continuously increasing (544,000 → 595,000 → 662,000 → 666,000 → 681,000 → 720,000). In 2026, there is an increase of about 39,000 candidates compared to 2025 (an increase of about 5.7%), intensifying overall competition. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, far from Shandong Province, and the willingness to study across provinces is greatly influenced by regional preferences. Candidates with similar score ranges typically prioritize universities in the eastern or central regions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend of 13,000 in rankings in 2025, the intensified competition due to a 5.7% increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province in 2026, the unchanged enrollment plan, the continuous decline in university rankings, and the lack of A-level advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to decline from the 2025 baseline of 121,771. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 123,271, with a range of 122,771 to 123,771.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 122,771 to 123,771, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (i.e., less than 122,771), you can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors such as Law and Accounting. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (i.e., close to 123,771), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西藏大学是国家'211工程'重点建设高校，入选'双一流'建设高校，是西藏自治区唯一的综合性大学。虽地处拉萨，但作为边疆地区重点高校，享有国家政策扶持，办学层次明确 ，对山东考生仍有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在山东考生中历来热度较高，但西藏大学地处高原，地理位置偏远，一定程度上影响了考生的报考意愿。2025年位次大幅后移也印证了地域因素对报考热度的抑制作 用。2026年医学类招生计划与2025年持平，整体招生规模稳定，未出现扩招或缩招信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型及历年趋势分析，预计2026年西藏大学医学类最低录取位次约为118581名，波动区间在118081-119081之间。位次较2025年略有前移，主要考虑到2025年位次大 幅后移后存在小幅回调可能，但整体仍处于近年低位区间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for Medicine was 103,434 (planned enrollment 13); in 2022, 102,528 (planned 12); in 2023, 103,324 (planned 12); in 2024, 108,386 (planned 12); in 2025, 119,781 (planned 13). In 2026, the planned enrollment for Medicine is 13, unchanged from 2025. Over the past five years, rankings initially stabilized and then declined; from 2021 to 2024, they fluctuated narrowly between 102,000 and 108,000, but in 2025, the ranking dropped significantly by about 11,000 places, reflecting a cooling of interest in Medicine.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a national '211 Project' key university, selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university, and is the only comprehensive university in the Tibet Autonomous Region. Although located in Lhasa, as a key university in a border region, it enjoys national policy support, has a clear educational level, and still holds some appeal for Shandong candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medicine majors have historically been popular among Shandong candidates, but Tibet University is located on a high-altitude plateau, and its remote geographical location has somewhat dampened candidates' willingness to apply. The significant drop in rankings in 2025 also confirms the suppressing effect of geographical factors on application enthusiasm. In 2026, the planned enrollment for Medicine is unchanged from 2025, with overall enrollment scale stable, showing no signs of expansion or contraction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical trend analysis, it is estimated that the minimum admission ranking for Medicine at Tibet University in 2026 will be approximately 118,581, with a fluctuation range between 118,081 and 119,081. The ranking is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025, mainly considering the possibility of a small rebound after the significant drop in 2025, but overall it remains in the low range of recent years.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
